mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_t (email, password, name, linked_customer) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{linkedCustomer})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_t WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT * FROM member_t WHERE email = #{email} AND active = 0

SELECT m.m_idx, m.email, m.password, m.name, m.linked_customer AS linkedCustomer, m.reg_date AS regDate, m.active, COALESCE(c.grade, '일반') AS grade, COALESCE(c.visit_count, 0 ) AS visitCount, COALESCE(c.phone, '' ) AS phone, COALESCE(c.memo, '' ) AS memo FROM member_t m LEFT JOIN customer_t c ON m.linked_customer = c.c_idx AND c.active = 0 WHERE m.m_idx = #{m_idx} AND m.active = 0
